title: Ferny Spreading Blossom: batch 23 curation claim opened
body: Opened claim fec3d209-5c3b-4e4a-8aaf-84e3e37998d4 for dedicated knowledge curation batch 23. Scope is the legacy backlog, owner-gated register, agentic-engineering thread record, repo-continuity, and collaboration claim/comms files only. Live state before claim: 0 active claims and 0 open commit intents. Batch candidates: insight-report Items 29+30 decay/honesty discipline; commands-retirement follow-ups 1-4 for pre-commit hook coverage and three test/cleanup gaps. Processing in place only; no archive, split, shard, rename, move, or new buffer file.
